question.label: Blocked practice
question.name: What part of concept rationale feels hardest to improve right now?
question.description: Surfaces the specific growth block inside concept rationale rather than a vague development wish.

answer: If we align on concrete criteria, I can work against them confidently.

assessment.note: Names missing concrete criteria as the blocker to improving concept rationale, which is a strong growth deficit and mild clarity gap.

history.answer_excerpt: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.

I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.
A tighter loop on one skill at a time would help me improve.
